description: You are preparing an anthropological ethnography for submission to a university press. Format the manuscript draft located at /home/ga/Documents/coastal_harvest_manuscript.odt according to the publisher guidelines found in /home/ga/Desktop/university_press_guidelines.txt. The document contains three chapters, interview excerpts prefixed with 'TRANSCRIPT:', and raw demographic data. Apply all required formatting, including chapter heading styles, line spacing, first-line indents, block quote margins, transcript tag cleanup, and table conversion for the demographic data. Save the completed document to its original path.

body_samples: The coastal communities of Maine have long relied
In the early hours of the morning, the harbor comes alive
Regulatory frameworks often clash with traditional ecological knowledge
quote_samples: Well, I've been fishing these waters for forty years
When the quotas came down, we didn't know how we'd survive
My grandfather built this boat with his own hands
They see us as an industry, but to us, it's our entire way of life
metadata.source: Realistic ethnographic text simulating fieldwork data
